help.header:
# Welcome to Pocket Tool!
You can view all the available command on the **{{website}}**
help.locale:
## How to change slash command language?
Slash commands are available in multiple languages and will automatically match your **{{langSettings}}**
help.customizationInfo: You can customize this bot however you want: change its name, its entire guild profile, go wild and make it totally your own!
help.disableCommands: You can visit **{{disableCommandsBlogPost}}** to learn how to disable commands

buttons.missingPerm: You need the {{perm}} permission to do this.
buttons.wrongChannel: You can only follow updates in text channels.

modals.title: Customize Pocket Tool as you wish!
modals.header: ## Shape, twist, and reinvent - at no cost!
modals.name: What should my name be?
modals.nameDesc: This is the name that appears on my guild profile.
modals.aboutMeDesc: This is the text that appears on my profile.
modals.profileUpdated: Both name and about me were updated successfully.
